description_fr: Chine, Japon, Inde, Asie du Sud-Est. Pays, capitales, fleuves, montagnes.
description_en: China, Japan, India, Southeast Asia. Countries, capitals, rivers, mountains.

questions.question_fr: Quel est le plus haut sommet du monde ?
questions.question_en: What is the highest peak in the world?
questions.explanation_fr: L'Everest culmine à 8 848,86 m, à la frontière Népal-Chine.
questions.explanation_en: Everest peaks at 8,848.86 m, on the Nepal-China border.

questions.question_fr: Quelle est la capitale du Japon ?
questions.question_en: What is the capital of Japan?
questions.explanation_fr: Tokyo, capitale du Japon, est la plus grande métropole au monde (~37 millions).
questions.explanation_en: Tokyo, capital of Japan, is the world's largest metropolis (~37 million).

questions.question_fr: La Chine est plus peuplée que l'Inde.
questions.question_en: China is more populous than India.
questions.explanation_fr: Faux. L'Inde a dépassé la Chine en 2023 (~1,42 milliard contre 1,41 milliard).
questions.explanation_en: False. India surpassed China in 2023 (~1.42 billion vs 1.41 billion).

questions.question_fr: Quel fleuve traverse le Vietnam et termine en delta dans le Sud ?
questions.question_en: Which river crosses Vietnam and ends in a southern delta?
questions.explanation_fr: Le Mékong (4 350 km) traverse 6 pays asiatiques avant son delta au Vietnam.
questions.explanation_en: The Mekong (4,350 km) crosses 6 Asian countries before its delta in Vietnam.

questions.question_fr: Quel monument indien est en marbre blanc ?
questions.question_en: Which Indian monument is in white marble?
questions.explanation_fr: Le Taj Mahal (Agra), construit par Shah Jahan en 1632 pour son épouse défunte.
questions.explanation_en: The Taj Mahal (Agra), built by Shah Jahan in 1632 for his deceased wife.

questions.question_fr: La capitale de la Chine est ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Pékin (Beijing en pinyin) est la capitale depuis 1949.
questions.explanation_en: Beijing has been the capital since 1949.

questions.question_fr: Combien de pays composent l'ASEAN (Asie du Sud-Est) ?
questions.question_en: How many countries are in ASEAN (Southeast Asia)?
questions.explanation_fr: 10 pays : Indonésie, Thaïlande, Vietnam, Singapour, Malaisie, Philippines, etc.
questions.explanation_en: 10 countries: Indonesia, Thailand, Vietnam, Singapore, Malaysia, Philippines, etc.

questions.explanation_fr: Singapour est une cité-État indépendante depuis 1965, ~5,9 millions d'habitants.
questions.explanation_en: Singapore is an independent city-state since 1965, ~5.9 million people.

questions.question_fr: Quel pays asiatique compte le plus d'îles ?
questions.question_en: Which Asian country has the most islands?
questions.explanation_fr: L'Indonésie compte ~17 500 îles, le plus grand archipel au monde.
questions.explanation_en: Indonesia has ~17,500 islands, the world's largest archipelago.

questions.question_fr: Quelle est la capitale de la Thaïlande ?
questions.question_en: What is the capital of Thailand?
questions.explanation_fr: Bangkok (Krung Thep) est la capitale et la plus grande ville (~10 millions).
questions.explanation_en: Bangkok (Krung Thep) is the capital and largest city (~10 million).

questions.question_fr: Le mont sacré du Japon est le mont ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Le mont Fuji (3 776 m), volcan actif, classé UNESCO.
questions.explanation_en: Mount Fuji (3,776 m), an active volcano, UNESCO listed.

questions.explanation_fr: L'Himalaya s'étend sur Inde, Népal, Bhoutan, Chine (Tibet) et Pakistan.
questions.explanation_en: The Himalayas span India, Nepal, Bhutan, China (Tibet) and Pakistan.

questions.question_fr: Quelle ville chinoise est la plus peuplée ?
questions.question_en: Which Chinese city is the most populous?
questions.explanation_fr: Shanghai compte ~26 millions d'habitants, la ville la plus peuplée de Chine.
questions.explanation_en: Shanghai has ~26 million inhabitants, China's most populous city.

questions.question_fr: Quel pays asiatique a la plus grande superficie ?
questions.question_en: Which Asian country has the largest area?
questions.explanation_fr: La Russie comprend la majeure partie de l'Asie du Nord. Hors Russie, c'est la Chine.
questions.explanation_en: Russia includes most of Northern Asia. Excluding Russia, it's China.

questions.question_fr: Le détroit qui sépare la Chine de Taïwan s'appelle le détroit de ___.
questions.question_en: The strait between China and Taiwan is the ___ Strait.
questions.explanation_fr: Le détroit de Taïwan (180 km de large) sépare l'île de la Chine continentale.
questions.explanation_en: The Taiwan Strait (180 km wide) separates the island from mainland China.
